message:
fix(abi): add input validation and errno propagation to sigpause, sigvec, and gsignal

- Add signal number validation to sigpause: reject sig <= 0 with EINVAL,
  validate via libc::sigaddset before attempting the operation, and
  delegate to host sigpause via dlsym when available
- Add errno propagation to sigvec: set errno from host on failure instead
  of silently returning the raw return code
- Add errno propagation to gsignal: set errno from host on libc::raise
  failure
- Add sigvec_invalid_signal_sets_errno_like_sigaction test comparing
  behavior against libc::sigaction for signal 0
- Add sigpause_invalid_signal_is_rejected_without_blocking test
- Add gsignal_invalid_signal_sets_errno_like_raise test comparing against
  libc::raise for out-of-range signal numbers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
